allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("HKCU:\\Software\\Oddshot Games", "HKCU:\\Software\\OddshotGames", "HKCU:\\Software\\gg.oddshot.slapshot", "HKCU:\\Software\\Slapshot"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "EXISTS: $p"; Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name } else { Write-Output "Not found: $p" } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem 'HKCU:\\Software\\Oddshot Games' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem 'HKCU:\\Software\\Oddshot Games' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "SUBKEY: $\($_.Name\)"; \(Get-ItemProperty $_.PSPath -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).PSObject.Properties | Where-Object { $_.Name -notmatch '^PS' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.Name\) = \(size: $\($_.Value.Length\)\)" } })

PowerShell($key = 'HKCU:\\Software\\Oddshot Games\\Slapshot'; $props = Get-ItemProperty $key; $props.PSObject.Properties | Where-Object { $_.Name -notmatch '^PS' } | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 200)

PowerShell($key = [Microsoft.Win32.Registry]::CurrentUser.OpenSubKey\('Software\\Oddshot Games\\Slapshot'\); $key.GetValueNames\(\) | Sort-Object | ForEach-Object { $kind = $key.GetValueKind\($_\); $cleanName = \($_ -split '_h'\)[0]; "$kind  $cleanName" } | Group-Object | Sort-Object Name | ForEach-Object { $_.Name })

PowerShell(Write-Output "USERPROFILE: $env:USERPROFILE"; Write-Output "USERPROFILE\\Desktop exists: $\(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop"\)"; Write-Output ""; $shellDesktop = [Environment]::GetFolderPath\('Desktop'\); Write-Output "Shell Desktop path: $shellDesktop"; Write-Output "Shell Desktop exists: $\(Test-Path $shellDesktop\)"; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Searching common spots for slapshot-settings.reg ==="; @\("$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop", "$env:USERPROFILE\\OneDrive\\Desktop", $shellDesktop, "$env:USERPROFILE", "$env:USERPROFILE\\Documents", \(Get-Location\).Path\) | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { $f = Join-Path $_ 'slapshot-settings.reg'; if \(Test-Path $f\) { $i = Get-Item $f; Write-Output "FOUND: $f \($\([math]::Round\($i.Length/1KB,1\)\) KB, modified $\($i.LastWriteTime\)\)" } else { Write-Output "not in: $_" } })
